2605.18181.title: Scalable Environments Drive Generalizable Agents
2605.18181.paper_summary: Generalizable agents should adapt to diverse tasks and unseen environments beyond their training distribution. This position paper argues that such generalization requires environment scaling: expanding the distribution of executable rule-sets that agents interact with, rather than only increasing trajectories or tasks within fixed benchmarks. Current scaling practices largely focus on collecting more experience or broader task sets under fixed interaction rules, leaving agents brittle when underlying interfaces, dynamics, observations, or feedback signals change. The core challenge is therefore a world-level distribution shift: agents need systematic exposure to environments with meaningfully different executable rule-sets. To clarify this challenge, we propose a unified taxonomy that separates trajectory scaling, task scaling, and environment scaling by their primary deliverables and by what changes in the executable rule-set. Building on this taxonomy, we synthesize construction paradigms for scalable environments, contrasting programmatic generators that prioritize controllability and verifiability with generative world models that offer broader coverage and open-endedness. We further outline how environment scaling can be coupled with stateful learning mechanisms, emphasizing learned update rules for cross-environment adaptation. We conclude by discussing alternative perspectives and argue that scalable environments provide the essential substrate for measurable and controllable progress toward robust general agents.
2605.18181.paper_summary_zh: 一般化的智能體應該能夠適應多樣的任務和未見的環境，超越其訓練分佈。這篇立場文件主張，這種一般化需要環境擴展：擴大智能體互動的可執行規則集的分佈，而不僅僅是增加固定基準下的軌跡或任務。目前的擴展實踐主要集中在在固定互動規則下收集更多經驗或更廣泛的任務集，這使得智能體在基礎接口、動態、觀察或反饋信號變化時變得脆弱。因此，核心挑戰是一種世界級的分佈轉變：智能體需要系統性地接觸具有意義上不同的可執行規則集的環境。為了澄清這一挑戰，我們提出了一個統一的分類法，根據其主要交付成果以及可執行規則集的變化，將軌跡擴展、任務擴展和環境擴展區分開來。在這一分類法的基礎上，我們綜合了可擴展環境的構建範式，對比了優先考慮可控性和可驗證性的程序生成器與提供更廣泛覆蓋和開放性生成的世界模型。我們進一步概述了如何將環境擴展與有狀態學習機制結合，強調學習的更新規則以實現跨環境適應。我們最後討論了替代觀點，並主張可擴展的環境為朝著穩健的一般化智能體邁向可測量和可控的進步提供了必要的基礎。
2605.18181.author: Jiayi Zhang et.al.
2605.18181.authors: Jiayi Zhang, Fanqi Kong, Guibin Zhang, Maojia Song, Zhaoyang Yu, Jianhao Ruan, Jinyu Xiang, Bang Liu, Chenglin Wu, Yuyu Luo
